international_shipping_policy: IMalidag izibophelele ekukhonzeni abathengi kwihlabathi liphela ngokuthumela okuthembekileyo kumazwe ngamazwe. Siyakuqonda ukubaluleka kokufikeleleka kunye nokuba lula, yiyo loo nto siye sakha uthungelwano lolungiselelo olufikelela kumazwekazi onke. Nokuba uphi na, sizama ukuqinisekisa ukuba amava akho okuthenga angenamthungo kwaye ayasebenza. Iinkonzo zethu zokuthumela ngenqanawa kumazwe ngamazwe zinabela eYurophu, eAfrika, eAsia, eMelika nangaphaya. Ngamaqabane athembekileyo okuhanjiswa kwehlabathi, siyakwazi ukubonelela ngothutho lwangexesha nolukhuselekileyo lweeodolo zakho. Yonke imithwalo ilawulwa ngononophelo ukugcina umgangatho wemveliso kunye nokuqinisekisa ukwaneliseka kwabathengi. E-Malidag, sijonga ukuthunyelwa kwenqanawa kumazwe ngamazwe njengento engaphezu kwenkonzo-sisithembiso. Isithembiso sokwenza iimveliso zethu zifumaneke kuluntu olwahlukeneyo nolwakhulayo lwehlabathi. Nokuba ungumntu othenga okokuqala okanye umthengi obuyayo, ungalindela ubuchwephesha, ukuthembeka, kunye nokhathalelo olungaguqukiyo kuyo yonke iodolo esiyenzayo.
shipping_notice: Sibonisa iimveliso ezithunyelwa kwindawo yakho. Unokukhetha indawo eyahlukileyo kwimenyu engentla.
learn_about_shipping: Funda malunga nokuthunyelwa kwamanye amazwe apha
no_toy_types_found: Akukho ntlobo zifunyenweyo zodidi lwezinto zokudlala
login_to_add_to_basket: Nceda ungene ukongeza izinto kwibhaskithi yakho.
basket_add_failed: Ayiphumelelanga ukongeza into kwibhaskithi. Nceda zama kwakhona.
basket_add_error: Kwenzeke imposiso xa usongezwa into kwingobozi yakho.
not_connected: 🚫 Awudibananga. Qinisekisa ukuba uqhagamshela kwinethiwekhi exhaswayo.
wallet_not_connected_warning: ⚠️ Isipaji sakho asiqhagamshelwanga. Nceda uqhagamshele isipaji sakho kuqala.
shipping_fee: EMalidag, sijonge ukubonelela ngeemali zokuthumela ezisekuhleni nezikhuphisanayo ezilungiselelwe indawo yakho kunye nohlobo lweodolo yakho. Iindleko zokuthumela zibalwa ngokuguquguqukayo ngexesha lokuphuma, kuthathelwa ingqalelo izinto ezifana nendawo ekuyiwa kuyo, indlela yokuthumela ngenqanawa, ubunzima bento, kunye nobungakanani bokupakishwa.  Sisebenzisana nabathwali abaninzi bamazwe aphesheya ukunika awona maxabiso akhoyo kuzo zombini iindlela zonikezelo ezisemgangathweni kunye nezicacileyo. Ngexesha lenkqubo yokuphuma, uya kukwazi ukujonga eyona ndleko yokuthumela ngaphambi kokuba ugqibezele ukuthenga kwakho - akukho ntlawulo ifihliweyo okanye iintlawulo ezingalindelekanga.  Ngee-odolo ezinkulu okanye ezo zigqithise kwixabiso elithile, sinokunikezela ngeentengiso zamahhala zokuthumela, eziza kuboniswa ngokucacileyo ekuphumeni. Ezi zinikezelo zinokwahluka ngokwengingqi kunye nexesha lonyaka.  Ukuba unayo nayiphi na imibuzo malunga neendleko zokuthumela okanye ukufaneleka kokuthunyelwa kwamahhala, zikhululeke ukuqhagamshelana neqela lethu lenkxaso. Silapha ukukunceda wenze esona sigqibo sinolwazi kwaye singabizi kakhulu kwiimfuno zakho zokuhanjiswa.

Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph1: EMalidag, siyaqonda ukuba ukuhanjiswa kwangexesha yinxalenye ebalulekileyo yamava akho okuthenga. Yiyo loo nto sisebenza ngokusondeleyo nabathwali abathembekileyo bamazwe aphesheya ukuqinisekisa ukuba iiodolo zakho zifikelela kuwe ngokukhuselekileyo nangempumelelo, nokuba uphi na emhlabeni.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph2: Amaxesha okuhanjiswa aqikelelweyo ayohluka ngokusekwe kwindawo oya kuyo, indlela yokuthumela ngenqanawa ekhethiweyo ekuphumeni, kunye nazo naziphi na iinkqubo ezisebenzayo zokucocwa kwempahla. Ngelixa sizama ukuhlangabezana nala maxesha angezantsi, ulibaziseko lwamathuba athile ngenxa yeenkonzo zeposi zasekuhlaleni okanye imigaqo yehlabathi ingenzeka.
standard: Ukuhanjiswa okusemgangathweni: Ngokuqhelekileyo kuhanjiswe phakathi kwe -7 kwiintsuku ze-21 zokusebenza , kuxhomekeke kwindawo kunye neemeko zenkonzo yeposi.
express: I-Express Shipping: Ifika phakathi kwe -3 ukuya kwiintsuku zokusebenza ze-7 kwiindawo ezininzi zokuya kumazwe ngamazwe ngokusebenzisa abathwali beprimiyamu.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph3: Uya kufumana inombolo yokulandelela ngokukhawuleza nje ukuba iodolo yakho ithunyelwe, ukuze ukwazi ukubeka iliso kuhambo lwayo ngexesha lokwenyani. Ukuba ipakethe yakho ilibaziseke ngaphaya kwefestile eqikelelweyo, iqela lethu lenkxaso lihlala likhona ukunceda ukusombulula ingxaki ngokukhawuleza.
Estimate_delivery_time_paragraph4: Nceda uqaphele ukuba iiholide zikawonke-wonke, ukuhlolwa kwempahla, okanye iindawo zokuhambisa ezikude zinokongeza ixesha elongezelelweyo. Sincoma ukukhetha ukuthunyelwa ngokukhawuleza kwii-odolo ezithatha ixesha.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph1: EMalidag, sijonge ukubonelela ngeemali zokuthumela ezisekuhleni nezikhuphisanayo ezilungiselelwe indawo yakho kunye nohlobo lweodolo yakho. Iindleko zokuthumela zibalwa ngokuguquguqukayo ngexesha lokuphuma, kuthathelwa ingqalelo izinto ezifana nendawo ekuyiwa kuyo, indlela yokuthumela ngenqanawa, ubunzima bento, kunye nobukhulu bokupakisha.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph2: Sisebenzisana nabathwali abaninzi bamazwe aphesheya ukunika awona maxabiso akhoyo kuzo zombini iindlela zonikezelo ezisemgangathweni kunye nezicacileyo. Ngexesha lenkqubo yokuphuma, uya kukwazi ukujonga eyona ndleko yokuthumela ngaphambi kokuba ugqibezele ukuthenga kwakho - akukho ntlawulo ifihliweyo okanye iintlawulo ezingalindelekanga.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph3: Ngee-odolo ezinkulu okanye ezo zigqithise kwixabiso elithile, sinokunikezela ngeentengiso zokuthumela simahla , eziya kuboniswa ngokucacileyo ekuphumeni. Ezi zinikezelo zinokwahluka ngokwengingqi kunye nexesha lonyaka.
Shipping_Fees_paragraph4: Ukuba unayo nayiphi na imibuzo malunga neendleko zokuthumela okanye ukufaneleka kokuthunyelwa kwamahhala, zikhululeke ukuqhagamshelana neqela lethu lenkxaso. Silapha ukukunceda wenze esona sigqibo sinolwazi kwaye singabizi kakhulu kwiimfuno zakho zokuhanjiswa.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph1: Nceda uqaphele ukuba zonke ii-odolo zamazwe ngamazwe zinokuba phantsi kwemirhumo yempahla evela ngaphandle, irhafu yokungenisa elizweni, kunye nezinye iintlawulo zolawulo ezibekwe ngurhulumente wendawo yakho. Le mirhumo ayiqukwanga kwimveliso okanye amaxabiso enqanawa aboniswe kwiMalidag kwaye anokuqokelelwa ligunya lesiko lendawo yakho ekuhanjisweni.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph2: Njengomamkeli, nguwe wedwa onoxanduva lokuqinisekisa ukuthotyelwa kwemithetho yelizwe lakho yokungenisa elizweni kunye nokuhlawula nayiphi na imirhumo esebenzayo. Sincoma ukujonga kwiofisi yelizwe lakho malunga neenkcukacha ezithile ngaphambi kokubeka iodolo yakho.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph3: I-Malidag ayinatyala lazo naziphi na iindleko ezongezelelweyo, ukulibaziseka kwezithethe, okanye ukwaliwa kweepakethi ngenxa yemisebenzi yokungenisa engahlawulwanga okanye imiba enxulumene nerhafu. Kwimeko apho iphakheji ibuyiswa ngenxa yokungahlawuli okanye ukungathobeli, nayiphi na intlawulo yokubuyisela okanye ukubuyisela imali kwi-restocking iya kutsalwa kwimbuyekezo yakho.
Customs_Duties_Taxes_paragraph4: Sizama ukwenza amava akho okuthenga kumazwe ngamazwe agudileyo kangangoko kwaye silapha ukuze sikuncede ngayo nayiphi na imibuzo emalunga nezithethe okanye amaxwebhu. Nceda ungathandabuzi ukuqhagamshelana neqela lethu lenkxaso ngaphambi okanye emva kokuthenga kwakho.
language_change_body_1: Ngokutshintsha ulwimi, zonke iinxalenye ze-app kuquka amagama emveliso, uphononongo, kunye nomxholo ziya kuboniswa ngolwimi olukhethiweyo.
language_change_body_3: Ukuba awungenanga, ukhetho lwakho aluyi kukhunjulwa.
language_change_body_4: Nceda ungene ukuze uqiniseke ukuba ulwimi lwakho lugcinwe kwiiseshoni zonke.
